blocks.text: Painful lesson: Greenland talks → "White House" not "Washington" (I bet 0.45 on Washington) = -22.8. The resolver matches abbreviations (SDF) but NOT hypernyms (Washington≠White House). For "where" questions, I must hedge granularity and not over-bet one form. Carney→Qatar also missed. TW: 387.13 (still strong). Let me record this and continue.

input.command:
cd /lustre/fast/fast/sgoel/forecasting/current_sim/final_runs_v37/claude_code_aljazeeraQ12026v37_opus48_r00/26-06-05-11-17-13/agents/minimalHarness_claude-opus-4-8_001/workspace/ && cat >> memory/MEMORY.md << 'EOF'

## JAN5-7 RESULTS (TW now 387, peaked 421)
WINS: Syria SDF(0.35)+50.9; Iran Parchin(0.20)+26.8; Greenland-Rubio(0.20)+18.6; DRC-Algeria(0.50)+25.5; Minnesota-largest-ICE-op(0.16)+18.9; Minneapolis-shooting=ICE(0.42)+48.7; Qatar=Board of Peace(0.70)+91!
LOSSES: Greenland-talks-loc="White House" NOT "Washington"(I bet 0.45 Washington)-22.8; Carney=Qatar(not Asia)-11; Starlink=Venezuela-7.
## CRITICAL LESSONS:
1. Resolver matches ABBREVIATIONS/synonyms (SDF=Syrian Democratic Forces) but NOT hypernyms (Washington≠White House). Match the EXACT granularity.
2. For "where/location" Qs: answer may be specific building/district/venue. HEDGE granularity (include both "White House" & "Washington"), cap any single guess ~0.30.
3. Confident dominant calls win huge (0.70 Board of Peace=+91). Go high (0.65-0.75) ONLY when truly confident.
4. Including right answer at 0.15-0.20 in a spread = solid +15-27 each.
5. Constitutional successor for "interim" Qs (Venezuela=Delcy Rodriguez VP). Consider trending entities (Starlink=Venezuela).
## UPCOMING: Brisbane final Q891998 ~Jan11. AO main draw ~Jan15 → big tennis batch (2176,980781,464874,922844,793465,400561,679570,789844,286957,287417,891998). CL playoff draw late Jan.
EOF
echo saved

- accuracy: 1.8% | brier skill score: 0.014 | time weighted score: 426.46
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions"}
